title: Total final energy consumption at regional and local authority level: 2005 to 2023
body: "Estimates of total final energy consumption from 2005 to 2023 at country, region and local authority level. These statistics were created by combining the following datasets:   Sub-national electricity consumption in Great Britain Sub-national electricity consumption in Northern Ireland Sub-national gas consumption in Great Britain Sub-national gas consumption in Northern Ireland Sub-national residual fuel consumption in the UK Sub-national road transport consumption in the UK  "

taxons.title: Energy and climate change: evidence and analysis
